infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show your position on the route and share it with your group.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is needed to track your position during group rides.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is needed for push-to-talk communication with your group.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow push-to-talk communication with your group.
